title: John Perdew
body: John P. Perdew (born August 30, 1943) is a theoretical condensed matter physicist known for his contributions to the fields of solid-state physics and quantum chemistry. His work on density functional theory has led to him being one of the world's most cited physicists. Perdew currently teaches and conducts research at Tulane University.
categories: Members of the International Academy of Quantum Molecular Science
Members of the United States National Academy of Sciences
